backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and retrieves per-user board states (staffing and course cards) using a Map, exposing query and update methods for get, set, and list all states.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (topbar shell, staffing board, seeding, SNHU board, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference index for the project's frontend modules.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'My Digital Board 2.0' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application shell rendering a three-section topbar (board selector + last-updated, live clock + date, lock/unlock button), switching between StaffingBoard and SNHUBoard views, and managing optimistic local state with backend sync and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/SNHUBoard.tsx: SNHU course tracker board component rendering three columns (Current Term, Upcoming Term, Not Assigned) with subsections, HTML5 drag-and-drop card movement, and lock-aware drag prevention.
frontend/src/components/StaffingBoard.ts: Amazon Workplace staffing board component rendering five columns with their subsections, HTML5 drag-and-drop between sections, card counts, and lock-aware drag prevention.
frontend/src/components/Toast.tsx: Fixed-position bottom-center toast notification component that renders a frosted-glass message bubble only when a non-empty message string is provided.
frontend/src/components/UnlockModal.tsx: A modal dialog component that prompts the user to confirm unlocking the board for editing, with Cancel and Unlock buttons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching (useBoardState) and updating (useUpdateBoardState) the board state from the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, imports the Inter font, defines a dark deep-space theme with CSS custom properties, and styles the scrollbar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/boardState.ts: Defines column/section layouts, card types (StaffCard, CourseCard), and utility functions for default state, canonical card data, and migration of legacy column keys for the board state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that extends the theme with Inter font, oklch-based color tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for 'My Digital Board 2.0', a single-HTML-file React app with an Amazon staffing board and SNHU course tracker, documenting architecture, existing features, known issues, and implementation notes.
